title: Goat Dimension
description: A mod that adds a dimension with new ore, tools, armor, and a new item.
body:
This mod adds multiple additions to your mincraft world.

To begin find a magic goat in the snowy slopes and kill it for its horn.
Next. craft horn blocks with 4 blocks of wool and any goat horn.
Then place the horn blocks in the shape of a nether portal and unse the horn dropped by the magic goat to ignite it.

Once in the dimension you can find goat ore to make tools and armor.
You can also find a new structure called the goat monolith which has a chance to have an orb of vanishing.
Punch a mob with the orb of vanishing and see what happens.

<details>
<summary>Orb of Vanishing</summary>
When you hit a mob with the orb of vanishing it foats up into the air and dissapears causing it to not drop its items.
**_DISCLAMER_**
Don't use it on your friends. It makes it unable to play the game.


</details>
